steps.title: Identify the new contribution
steps.content: The key signal is the phrase by incorporating pop melodies into it—this specifies a new stylistic element that Charli XCX added to hyperpop.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: Choice A correctly identifies that the sentence introduces an artist and her new stylistic element. The other choices invent criticism, broaden the scope, or contradict the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
